title: The Straw Hats Break CP9’s Wall: Key Exchange
description: In the Enies Lobby Climax storyline, this section centers on CP9, Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Franky, Unknown person #10 as the scene develops across pages 9–12.
scene: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through CP9, Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the straw hats break cp9’s wall: key exchange.

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #4
dialogue.text: That nose is better than Sogepp's !!!

dialogue.speaker: Whitebeard
dialogue.text: Who the heck is Sogepp!? And...

dialogue.speaker: Unknown person #5
dialogue.text: Kaku's controlling his ability pretty well.

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: W-WOLF!! I... I am your opponent!!!

dialogue.speaker: CP9
dialogue.text: You want to rescue your Nakama, right?

dialogue.speaker: Franky
dialogue.text: That's right!! So I'll take your key!!!

summary: This scene advances the Enies Lobby Climax conflict through CP9, Whitebeard, Unknown person #4, Unknown person #5, Franky, focusing on the immediate stakes of the straw hats break cp9’s wall: key exchange.
